name: sonycamera-transfer
description: PWA: receive Sony A7 IV photos via FTP into an unraid share, browse and download them

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @sonycam/shared build && concurrently "pnpm dev:shared" "pnpm dev:backend" "pnpm dev:frontend"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @sonycam/shared build && pnpm --filter @sonycam/backend build && pnpm --filter @sonycam/frontend build
